metadata.description: Claude Code skills for smollama — a local AI assistant running on Raspberry Pi with Ollama. Includes Pi-specific skills for GPIO, memory management, and ARM architecture.

plugins.name: rpi-gpio
plugins.description: GPIO, I2C, SPI, UART, PWM, sensor wiring, and adding hardware devices to smollama on Raspberry Pi.

plugins.name: rpi-memory
plugins.description: OOM errors, swap configuration, model selection for limited RAM, and memory optimization on Raspberry Pi.

plugins.name: rpi-arch
plugins.description: ARM compatibility, package installation failures, Pi OS versions, throttling, and platform differences from x86.
